The '''57th [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 8 to 18 February 2007.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/01_jahresblatt_2007/01_Jahresblatt_2007.html |title=57TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 8 - 18, 2007 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131104212817/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/01_jahresblatt_2007/01_Jahresblatt_2007.html| archive-date=4 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref> The opening film of this year's festival was [[Olivier Dahan]]’s ''[[La Vie En Rose (film)|La Vie En Rose]]''.<ref name="line-up">{{cite web |url=http://cineuropa.org/nw.aspx?t=newsdetail&l=en&did=72042 |title=Delpy, Ferran and Spinosa in line-up |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=cineuropa|date=12 January 2007 }}</ref> ''[[Angel (2007 film)|Angel]]'' by [[François Ozon]] served as the closing night film.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://en.unifrance.org/news/4804/57th-berlin-international-film-festival-official-selection-announced |title=57th Berlin International Film Festival: Official Selection announced |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=unifrance}}</ref> American director [[Paul Schrader]] was the jury president of the main competition.<ref>{{cite news |url=http://www.spiegel.de/international/cinephile-paradise-filmlovers-flock-to-berlin-film-festival-a-464651.html |title=Cinephile Paradise: Filmlovers Flock to Berlin Film Festival |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=spiegel|date=6 February 2007 |last1=Smith |first1=David Gordon }}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to the Chinese film ''[[Tuya's Marriage]]'' directed by [[Wang Quan'an]].<ref name="BBCBerlin">{{cite news |url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/entertainment/6371893.stm |title=China film wins top Berlin award |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=BBC News|date=18 February 2007 }}</ref> 224,181 tickets of the festival were sold.<ref name="FF">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/01_jahresblatt_2007/01_Jahresblatt_2007.html |title=57TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 8 - 18, 2007 |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=berlinale}}</ref>

The festival held a ''Retrospective programme'' about women in [[silent film|silent era films]]. The films which were shown in the retrospective included a restored colour version of the 1921 film ''[[Hamlet (1921 film)|Hamlet]]'', starring [[Asta Nielsen]], the 1914 Italian film ''[[Cabiria]]'' and ''[[Berlin Alexanderplatz (miniseries)|Berlin Alexanderplatz]]''.<ref name="FF" /><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.deutsche-kinemathek.de/en/retrospective/2007/special-events/more |title=Special screening during the Retrospective of the 57th Berlin International Film Festival |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=deutsche-kinemathek}}</ref>

== Juries ==
[[File:Paul Schrader.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Paul Schrader]], Jury President]]
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/04_jury_2007/04_Jury_2007.html |title=JURIES 2007 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023101259/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/04_jury_2007/04_Jury_2007.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Paul Schrader]], American director and screenwriter - Jury President
* [[Hiam Abbass]], Palestinian actress and director
* [[Mario Adorf]], German actor
* [[Willem Dafoe]], American actor
* [[Gael García Bernal]], Mexican actor, director and producer
* [[Nansun Shi]], Hong Kong producer
* Molly Malene Stensgaard, Danish editor

=== Best First Feature Award ===
* Judy Counihan, British producer
* [[Niki Karimi]], Iranian actress
* Gerhard Meixner, German producer

=== Short Film Competition ===
* [[Peace Anyiam-Fiberesima]], Nigerian producer
* [[Riina Sildos]], Estonian producer
* [[Ning Ying]], Chinese director, screenwriter and producer

== Official Sections ==

=== Main Competition ===
The following films were selected in competition for the [[Berlin International Film Festival#Awards|Golden Bear]] and Silver Bear awards:<ref name="Programme">{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/02_programm_2007/02_Programm_2007.html |title=PROGRAMME 2007|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131109181051/https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/02_programm_2007/02_Programm_2007.html| archive-date=9 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref name="line-up" /><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.ctvm.info/article.php3?id_article=282 |title=The selection for the Competition of the 57th Berlin International Film Festival is nearly complete |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=ctvm.info |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140714225425/http://www.ctvm.info/article.php3?id_article=282 |archive-date=14 July 2014 |url-status=dead |df=dmy-all }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.dw.de/2007-berlinale-to-open-with-wartime-dramas/a-2300459 |title=2007 Berlinale to Open With Wartime Dramas |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=dw.de}}</ref>

==Official Awards==
[[File:Wang Quan'an (Berlin Film Festival 2010).jpg|thumb|200px|[[Wang Quan'an]], winner of the Golden Bear at the festival]]
The following awards were presented at the festival.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/57_ifb/57_IFB_Awards.pdf |title=The awards of the 57th Berlin International Film Festival |access-date=5 June 2014 |work=ctvm.info}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/03_preistr_ger_2007/03_Preistraeger_2007.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2007|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015121241/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2007/03_preistr_ger_2007/03_Preistraeger_2007.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

===Main Competition===

* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Tuya's Marriage]]'' by [[Wang Quan'an]].
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: [[Ariel Rotter]] for ''[[The Other (2007 film)|The Other]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Joseph Cedar]] for [[Beaufort (film)|''Beaufort'']]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: Julio Chávez for ''[[The Other (2007 film)|The Other]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Nina Hoss]] for [[Yella (film)|''Yella'']]
* '''Silver Bear for Best Music''': [[David Mackenzie (director)|David Mackenzie]] for ''[[Hallam Foe]]''
* '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': For the Ensemble Cast of ''[[The Good Shepherd (film)|The Good Shepherd]]''
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: [[Park Chan-wook]] for ''[[I'm a Cyborg, But That's OK]]''
* [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]]: [[I Served the King of England (film)|''I Served the King of England'']] by [[Jiří Menzel]]
* '''Best First Feature:''' [[Vanaja (film)|Vanaja]] by [[Rajnesh Domalpalli]]
